name: tickerplay
description: Tickerplay.com — mirrored locally, hosted on AWS Amplify + API Gateway/Lambda

scripts.api:install: npm install --prefix api/contact && npm install --prefix api/analytics && npm install --prefix api/admin
scripts.seo:build: python3 scripts/content_quality.py && python3 scripts/optimize_images.py && python3 scripts/apply_keywords.py && python3 scripts/seo_build.py
scripts.seo:build:prod: IS_PRODUCTION=true python3 scripts/content_quality.py && python3 scripts/optimize_images.py && python3 scripts/apply_keywords.py && IS_PRODUCTION=true python3 scripts/seo_build.py
